text: Adapting large language models (LLMs) to specialized downstream tasks relies heavily on efficient fine-tuning. However, implementing these techniques across diverse model architectures often requires significant manual effort and deep technical expertise. We introduce LLAMAFACTORY, a unified framework designed to streamline and democratize the fine-tuning process for over 100 LLMs. By integrating a suite of state-of-the-art efficient training methods, LLAMAFACTORY allows users to flexibly customize models without writing code, primarily through its intuitive web interface, LLAMABOARD. We provide empirical evidence of the framework's efficiency and performance across language modeling and text generation benchmarks. Since its release, LLAMAFACTORY has gained significant traction in the open-source community, surpassing 25,000 stars and 3,000 forks on GitHub. The framework is available at: https://github.com/hiyouga/LLaMA-Factory.
